title: psychotria sechellarum
intro: Psychotria sechellarum, also known as the Seychelles wild coffee or Seychelles coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is native to the Seychelles Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria sechellarum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of administration to harness its medicinal properties.
